digests.weekSummary: A heavy week of Anthropic platform updates, but most are deprecations, internal API migrations, or incremental agent-platform tweaks that don't open new building opportunities. The real signals are the Sonnet 5 and Fable 5 launches (big context windows, introductory pricing), the rate-limit increase that removes a real throughput bottleneck, the code execution tool's new persistent state, native cron scheduling for Managed Agents, and a new Swift/Apple integration path — each of these is a genuine, buildable opportunity worth a closer look.
